shortDescription: Agentic software delivery — automated requirements-to-code pipeline driven by an agentic AI process
readme:
## Agentic Software Delivery

This project tracks the full delivery lifecycle for the `ai-native-delivery` framework — a label-driven, fully automated software delivery pipeline built on GitHub Issues and GitHub Actions.

### How it works

Work moves through the pipeline by applying labels to issues. GitHub Actions recipes handle each phase automatically, from design through to a merged pull request.

### Status columns

| Status | Colour | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| **Backlog** | Gray | Captured and prioritised, ready to be scoped |
| **Scoping** | Purple | Requirement or feature is being decomposed in a scoping conversation |
| **Ready to Implement** | Blue | Scoped and queued — waiting for the Feature Design session to begin |
| **In Design** | Pink | Feature Design session active — tasks are being created |
| **Designed** | Teal | Design complete; parked awaiting human re-trigger to implementation |
| **In Development** | Yellow | Dev Session active — code is being written and tested |
| **In Review** | Orange | Pull request open and awaiting human review |
| **Done** | Green | Merged, closed, and delivered |

### Pipeline phases

1. **Requirements** (Phase 1) — Human captures a business need as a `requirement` issue
2. **Scoping** (Phase 2) — Human decomposes the requirement into `feature` issues
3. **Feature Design** (Phase 3) — Triggered automatically by `in-design` label (or interactively by `interactive-design`); agent creates task sub-issues and the feature branch
4. **Dev Session** (Phase 4) — Triggered automatically by `in-development` label; agent implements all tasks, commits, pushes, and exits cleanly
5. **PR Review** (Phase 4b) — Triggered automatically when a PR review is submitted; agent processes feedback
6. **Done** — Human merges the PR; issue is closed and status set to Done

### Labels

**Type:** `requirement` `feature` `task`

**Lifecycle:** `backlog` `scoping` `ready-to-implement` `in-design` `interactive-design` `designed` `in-development` `in-review` `done`

**Classification:** `needs-interactive-design`

**Concurrency beacons:** `design-in-progress` `development-in-progress`

### Tools

- [`gh-agentic`](https://github.com/eddiecarpenter/gh-agentic) — GitHub CLI extension for bootstrapping, syncing and diagnosing agentic environments

options.description: Scoped and queued, waiting for design
